mapper.sql: policy_id, policy_domain, applies_to_contract_type, severity, trigger_keywords, control_objective, policy_text_for_embedding, required_evidence, escalation_role, vector_doc_id, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM policy_knowledge ORDER BY policy_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_knowledge ( policy_id, policy_domain, applies_to_contract_type, severity, trigger_keywords, control_objective, policy_text_for_embedding, required_evidence, escalation_role, vector_doc_id, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{policyId}, #{policyDomain}, #{appliesToContractType}, #{severity}, #{triggerKeywords}, #{controlObjective}, #{policyTextForEmbedding}, #{requiredEvidence}, #{escalationRole}, #{vectorDocId}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (policy_id) DO UPDATE SET policy_domain = EXCLUDED.policy_domain, applies_to_contract_type = EXCLUDED.applies_to_contract_type, severity = EXCLUDED.severity, trigger_keywords = EXCLUDED.trigger_keywords, control_objective = EXCLUDED.control_objective, policy_text_for_embedding = EXCLUDED.policy_text_for_embedding, required_evidence = EXCLUDED.required_evidence, escalation_role = EXCLUDED.escalation_role, vector_doc_id = EXCLUDED.vector_doc_id, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
